candidates.why: Direct COGS label, but this exact label appears more than once in the sheet, creating ambiguity.

Overhead bucket, though may include some non-SG&A items.

Asset balance, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Assets under development- Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Best semantic match is the income statement R&D row, but the exact label appears multiple times, so the specific underlying row instance is ambiguous.

candidates.why: Single reported finance-cost line available across years; broader than pure interest but best consolidated fallback.
Specific interest expense line, but only a component and not complete for all years.

Finance component, not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Lease-interest component only; supplemental.
Balance sheet accrual, not the income statement expense line.

variables.notes: Priority list for changing labels: prefer explicit interest expense if reported; otherwise use broader financial expenses as fallback.

Balancing row, not a reported equity line.
